title: Positive flow: Navigating to the date selection screen
test_steps: Open the application. | Click on the 'Time travel' screen. | Click on the 'PICK A DATE' button.
expected_result: The user is navigated to the date selection screen.

title: Negative flow: Invalid date selection
test_steps: Open the application. | Click on the 'Time travel' screen. | Click on the 'PICK A DATE' button. | Select an invalid date (e.g., a date in the future).
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the selected date is invalid.

title: Boundary validation: Minimum date selection
test_steps: Open the application. | Click on the 'Time travel' screen. | Click on the 'PICK A DATE' button. | Select the earliest possible date.
expected_result: The earliest possible date is selected without any errors.

title: Boundary validation: Maximum date selection
test_steps: Open the application. | Click on the 'Time travel' screen. | Click on the 'PICK A DATE' button. | Select the latest possible date.
expected_result: The latest possible date is selected without any errors.

title: UI test: Header navigation
test_steps: Open the application. | Click on the 'Time travel' screen. | Click on the back arrow in the header.
expected_result: The user is navigated back to the previous screen.

title: Usability test: Date selection
test_steps: Open the application. | Click on the 'Time travel' screen. | Click on the 'PICK A DATE' button. | Select a date and confirm the selection.
expected_result: The selected date is confirmed and the screen updates to reflect the new date.

title: Accessibility test: Navigation bar
test_steps: Open the application. | Click on the 'Time travel' screen. | Click on the back button in the navigation bar.
expected_result: The user is navigated back to the previous screen.

title: Data persistence test: Date selection
test_steps: Open the application. | Click on the 'Time travel' screen. | Click on the 'PICK A DATE' button. | Select a date and confirm the selection. | Close the application and reopen it. | Check if the selected date is still displayed.
expected_result: The selected date is still displayed upon reopening the application.
